description.short: Discover Casanemo Beach Resort & Spa in beautiful Sabang, Aceh, where stunning beaches and lush landscapes await. Perfect for two travelers looking for adventure, this destination offers top-notch diving and snorkeling experiences. Enjoy exclusive access to a private beach for utmost relaxation, and unwind at a stylish bar with cocktails in the evening. Start your day at a cozy coffee shop, ideal for leisurely mornings. Accommodations feature refreshing ocean breezes from private balconies, while air conditioning ensures a comfortable stay. Choose select rooms for breathtaking views of the beach, setting the stage for an unforgettable getaway. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Casa Nemo is built into a hill and has many steps to get down to the beach at the bottom. That said, if you can't do multiple flights of stairs, you can still enjoy the restaurant and spa which are located near the road. There are also bungalows closer to the road (I think you may have to go down one flight of stairs to get to the highest bungalows). One major upside to the resort being built into the hill is that you'll get an ocean view from almost every part of the resort. It truly is a paradise!
comments.reviewPositives:
Casa Nemo is owned by an Acehnese woman who prioritizes cultivating beautiful experiences and running an ethical, eco-friendly business. The entire resort is beautifully manicured with fruit trees and flowers everywhere. Everything here is done with intention and love. The staff take great pride in their work.
Aceh Heritage Village:
Right when you walk in, you'll see two beautifully restored historic Acehnese houses featuring hand carved and painted decorations. This is totally unique on the island, and it's a must-see. Sometimes there are events there, so check with the resort to see about the schedule.
The restaurant:
The restaurant is stunning with an inviting porch that reveals the ocean and the lush landscape. The food is delightful with a mix of Indonesian and Western options. I am gluten free with a sensitive stomach. The restaurant always accommodates my dietary restrictions, and I always feel good after I eat there! If you will be staying awhile, you can even bring your own gluten free flour, and they will prepare something special for you. I love the ayam tangkap (an Acehnese specialty that you can't find many places on the island) and tom yum.
The rooms:
Every bungalow is done in the traditional Acehnese style with wooden carved decorations. My bungalow had a porch with a hammock which was the perfect place to relax while watching the ocean and listening to the sounds of nature. The bed was comfortable. The shower had hot water and it was easy to control the temperature, which cannot be said of many showers on the island. There was also a fridge and water dispenser in the room including hot water and china cups.
The spa:
I have had some of the best massages of my life at the spa here. My favorite is the Javanese. Masseuses are expertly trained and accommodating with any issues you may have. Friends of mine have had waxing done with excellent results.
The beach:
Great for lounging and a gentle swim.
comments.reviewTitle: Hands-down the best place to stay, eat, and get massaged on the island.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Excellent holiday, if you want to spend a good beach, comfortable room, having massage and good food, this is a place to stay for all in one. Plus all the staff are so warm and friendly. Fully recommended.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Some of the facilities are a bit worn out, and we were missing a small table on the terrace of our bungalow.
comments.reviewPositives: Very nice staff and overall a good standard throughout. The private beach is a definite highlight—there’s a great reef just in front, and we went snorkeling there quite often. One minor downside: the restaurant guests can be a bit much sometimes, constantly taking billions of pictures of everything. But I guess that’s just the social media tax these days—not unique to this part of Indonesia.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The heart of a hotel is not its facilities but its people. The kindness of the staff elevates the hotel's quality. One of the staff members, Junie, sincerely helped us with our discomforts. Just a simple greeting of "Hello" because she likes Korea melted away the fatigue from our journey. Although we had planned to stay for only one day, we ended up staying for three days due to Junie's kindness. If I travel here again, I will definitely come back.

comments.reviewNegatives: Such a terrible hotel, Don't stay here, You are overpaying an outdated hotel with their 20 years old broken mattress, disgusting pillow, moldy room, and overworked AC, we visited sabang for over 3 weeks and we thought stay here for the last part and big mistake, the price is 4x more than avg homestay in sabang with far poorer quality, NO WIFI IN EVERY ROOM!! what is this 2024??? It's only cost you £10 to add extender so wifi can be reached but no the owner is very very greedy, people do need internet nowadays for various reason, their only option is go to restaurant if you need wifi, their mattress are broken and we complaint about this staff wouldn't bothered, pillow is very old and disgusting, never washed, AC is overworked at night we are still dying too hot despite it's been put to lowest possible sign it's never being serviced, our £15 room in other island offer more value than this place, stir away, the only good thing is the little privacy in beach but again coral is very washed and bleached so don't expect good underwater life.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
This is by far the worst accommodation I have ever experienced. 
To access the room you have to climb a steep 8 foot ladder without a hand rail on both sides. The room has zero protection against mosquitoes even though it's completely exposed to the outside. The shower didn't work and the staff asked if we were okay to use the bucket that flushes the toilet to shower with instead. The bathroom door is completely broken and it locks people inside. (This happened to multiple people during our stay and sometimes people were trapped inside for over 5 minutes)
A giant industrial sized generator is located directly underneath the room and it is turned on every night and runs for hours. The generator shakes the entire building, the noise is deafening and the diesel fumes are blown directly up and into the room flooding the whole building with a toxic smell and making it dangerous to breath.
The fan provided for our room was completely busted, rusty and the fan guard was broken and the blades were exposed. 
Opposite the room a strange group of men are always sitting and smoking cigarettes from the early evening till after midnight, they stare at you every time you enter the room or go to the bathroom without saying anything or smiling. 
The breakfast was completely spoiled and a lot of food was covered in flies.
I would not stay here again even if I was paid to do so. Avoid!

Me hice masajes, descansé en la playa.. y pasé varias horas en el lobby trabajando en compañía de todo el staff que no podría haber sido más encantador y haberme hecho sentir mejor! Un 10 sobre 10, sobretodo Raya en comedor, un encanto y super cariñosa y la amabilidad de Tegar en recepción, intentando practicar el español que sabe y ayudándome en todo. Mi estancia ha sido increible! Lugar super recomendable

La playa que tiene justo delante es fabulosa. La comida que sirven está buenísima. Toda la gente que trabaja en Casa Nemo Beach te ayuda siempre con una sonrisa. Puedes alquilar un scooter directamente con ellos, lo que facilita mucho el poderse mover por la isla.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments:
1. Located in the northeast part of the island, it is quite far from the bustling Gabang Beach and most diving shops, taking about 1 hour by tuk-tuk, but it is relatively quiet and suitable for a vacation.  
2. The hotel has its own restaurant, charges a service fee, and there are also some restaurants nearby, just a 10-minute ride on a motorcycle to the town, which is convenient.  
3. The island tour recommended by the hotel is highly recommended! It is very interesting and allows for flexibility in stopping at various places. The driver's English is excellent, and he is thoughtful and enthusiastic; he is the most reliable Indonesian I have ever met, providing great assistance when we encountered problems.

comments.reviewNegatives: Rien, tout était absolument parfait !
comments.reviewPositives: Expérience inoubliable à Casa Nemo où nous avons été accueillis par une équipe au top, d'une extrême gentillesse et avec un sens du service qu'on ne trouve que très rarement. Tout le monde s'est littéralement plié en 4 pour nous rendre le séjour agréable anticipant nos besoins et ceux de notre petite de 3 ans (choyée comme une princesse). Ainsi, nous remercions chaleureusement et tout particulièrement Junie, adorable, et son équipe. Merci également à Brata qui s'occupe avec brio du spa et délivre des soins de super qualité. L'établissement est vraiment chouette avec sa petite crique magnifique (à l'extrémité de Sumur Tiga) où le snorkeling est un régal. Les chambres situées dans un très beau jardin sont vraiment très agréables. Le restaurant est top (avec un petit déj exceptionnel) et s'est adapté à nos besoins durant cette période de ramadan. Les espaces communs sont également confortables, le tout étant décoré avec goût. Bref, un vrai coup de coeur d'où il est difficile de partir et où on a hâte de revenir ! Merci encore à toute l'équipe du Casa Nemo :-)

comments.responseText: Hello Ibu, Terimakasih banyak sudah memilih resort kami untuk akomodasinya ibu, Terimakasih atas review nya, untuk hal2 yang kurang  ini akan kami perbaiki kedepannya, untuk nyamuk jika musim hujan memang lagi banyak ibu dan kita juga di area sedikit hutan taman, Dikamar sudah tersedia kelambu juga, Dan mohon maaf mengenai jam check out, team resepsionis kami sudah infokan sebelumnya  ketika check in bahwa jam  check out di jam 11;30 ibu, karena kamar nya akan  di check in kan lagi oleh tamu baru, dan team Housekeeping kami membutuhkan waktu untuk membersihkan dan vacum kamar nya juga ibu. karena jam 2 siang  adalah jam check in resort kami bu. Terimakasih ibu sudah stay dan maaf atas ketidaknyamannya ibu, kami harap jika suatu waktu kembali lagi semua sudah diperbaiki. Sehat selalu ibu dan murah rezekinya. Have a nice day ibu.
comments.reviewComments: Small air shower, bathroom ceramics have yellow stains, first time staying at the hotel must check out by 11:30 already WhatsApped and the staff immediately told me to check out at the door of the room, the building is cracked from the top window down to the bottom so there are holes, reptiles might be able to enter through that crack. Lots of mosquitoes, ended up with bumps. On the positive side, the restaurant staff were friendly. The food tasted average. Not to repeat staying again.

comments.reviewPositives:
Tolle Lage am Strand, eingebettet in eine wunderschöne tropische Gartenanlage. Der Ausblick vom Balkon unserer Villa aber auch vom Restaurant einfach traumhaft. Das gesamte Team ist rundum aufmerksam, zuvorkommend und herzlich. Alle Wünsche oder Anliegen werden direkt berücksichtigt. Wir haben uns sehr wohl und willkommen gefühlt. Besonders die Gespräche mit Balqis der Eigentümerin, aber auch Junie und den anderen Teammitgliedern geben einem ein familiäres Gefühl und spannende Einblicke.
Die Massagen im Spa sind einfach super und runden das Wohlgefühl ab.

comments.reviewPositives:
Für uns persönlich hat das Casa Nemo statt 10 Sterne mindestens 20 Sterne verdient.

Wir verbrachten unseren Urlaub Anfang Mai 2025 bei Casa Nemo. Die Organisation im Vorfeld verlief absolut problemfrei, Shuttle vom Hafen ins Hotel war tip top organisiert. Der Empfang im Resort war von Herzen und zu 100% ehrlich. Es ist zu spüren, dass das ganze Team zusammen hält und sich wie eine Familie fühlt und so ist auch der Service, herzlich, zuvorkommend und extrem bemüht. Der Bungalow war eingebettet in einen Hügel, umgeben von einem tropischen Garten der täglich gehegt und gepflegt wird. Morgens aufzustehen und auf der Veranda die Sonne über dem Meer aufgehen zu sehen war unglaublich. Besonders hervorheben möchten wir die PR Managerin June, sie war uns bei allen unseren Anliegen behilflich und hat uns jeden Wunsch von den Augen abgelesen. Wir kamen als Gäste und gingen als Freunde - danke an das ganze Team für die tolle Zeit.

comments.reviewPositives:
Casa Nemo war für uns eine Etappe unserer Weltreise als Familie mit drei Kindern und es war absolut die richtige Wahl. Wir waren für einen kompletten Monat in Casa Nemo Beach Resort.
Wir hatten einen tollen Familienbungalow mitten in der sehr gepflegten Grünanlage mit Blick auf's Meer.
Die Betten sind bequem, der Standard der Badezimmer "westlich" mit Dusche und WC.
Besonders zu erwähnen ist das unglaublich freundliche und hilfsbereite Personal. June und Putri insbesondere lasen uns jeden Wunsch von den Augen ab und waren auch super kompetente Ansprechpartner in Sachen Ausflüge. Aber auch alle anderen Angestellten sind super herzlich und kinderlieb. Wir können das Resort also auch für Familien sehr empfehlen.
Wir haben den Geburtstag unseres 9jährigen auf der Terrasse dort gefeiert und sind mit Torte, einem schön gedeckten Tisch und einem Ständchen überrascht worden.
Putri hat sich so liebevoll um unsere Kinder gekümmert und mit ihnen ganz toll spielerisch Englisch gelernt. 
Das Essen im Restaurant ist hervorragend, sowohl das Frühstück als auch das Abendessen. Wir haben die Karte durchprobiert und alles schmeckte köstlich. Besonders geschmeckt hat uns Erwachsenen Ayam Tangkap, was wir noch nie zuvor auf der Welt irgendwo gegessen, aber sehr zu schätzen gelernt haben. 
Beim Schnorcheln direkt vor dem Resort sahen wir viele bunte Fische und sogar eine Schildkröte. Am Strand ist Bikini für Frauen auch kein Problem.
Die Massagen waren sehr gut.

Insgesamt gefiel uns auch die Wahl der Insel Pulau Weh/Sabang ganz hervorragend. Die Menschen dort sind von Grund auf ehrlich und herzlich. Man musste nie auf seine Sachen abgeben oder sich Gedanken machen, ob man übers Ohr gehauen wird - kam nie vor. Eine ganz tolle Mentalität. Die Kinder und wir haben uns zu jeder Zeit sicher und willkommen gefühlt.

Ganz herzlichen Dank noch einmal an all die lieben Menschen der Casa Nemo/Aceh Heritage. Ihr seid einfach klasse! Wir werden euch sehr vermissen.

comments.reviewNegatives:
Es gibt hier einige Moskitos, also Repellent mitnehmen. Das Bett hatte kein echtes Moskitonetz, nur eine Himmelbettdeko. Die habe ich vorsichtig so zuziehen können, dass ich gut geschützt war. Aber nachdem die ersten Moskitos erlegt waren, kamen ohnehin keine neuen mehr ins Zimmer (wenn man alles geschlossen hielt).
Die Speisekarte ist sehr klein gehalten, und es war nicht immer alles vorhanden. Wenn man mehr Abwechslung möchte, muss man sich vielleicht außerhalb des Hotels umschauen, was wir nicht ausprobiert haben (ca. 10min Fußweg zum nächsten Lokal/Hotel Freddies, wobei sich dort nach einem Besitzerwechsel vieles verschlechtert haben soll). Die Portionen sind landesüblich recht übersichtlich und auch preislich höher angesiedelt.
Aber es hat immer alles gut geschmeckt und auch Extrawünsche wurden immer berücksichtigt - von daher haben wir das gern in Kauf genommen.
comments.reviewPositives:
Fast alles!
Wir hatten Deluxe Doppelzimmer im oberen Teil der Anlage gebucht, da diese Klimaanlage haben. Sie sind recht geräumig, haben ein schönes Bad (wobei eines unserer beiden Zimmer das Waschbecken und den Spiegel im Raum und nicht im eigentlichen Bad hatte), Kühlschrank, Wasserspender (heiß und kalt), Kleiderschrank, Trockenständer und einen schaukelnden Korbsessel auf dem Balkon.
Handtuchwechsel, Reinigung des Zimmers, etc. geschieht nicht automatisch, sondern auf Anfrage an der Rezeption.
Ein Frühstücksbuffet mit guter Auswahl an einheimischen und für Europäer eher gewohnten Speisen ist in unserem Zimmerpreis enthalten gewesen.
Alle Mitarbeiter waren äußerst freundlich und zuvorkommend. Besondere Erwähnung verdienen June, die alles perfekt organisiert hat (Aufenthaltsverlängerung, Taxitransfers, Fährticket, Mietroller, etc.) und die Mitarbeiter im Restaurant sowie an der Bar am Strand (deren Namen mir leider entfallen sind), die sich rührend um uns gekümmert haben. Gelegentlich muß man Abstriche machen, weil auf der Insel anscheinend Lieferengpässe bestehen, aber es wurde alles getan, was möglich war.
Die Anlage liegt etwas vom Schuß, ruhig mit viel Bepflanzung am Hang und mit vielen Stufen.
Es gibt einen weißen Privatstrand (etwas steinig) und 6 Sonnenliegen im Schatten. Leider wird etwas Müll angeschwemmt (teilweise Glas), der von den Angestellten eingesammelt wird.
Direkt vom Strand aus kann man gut schnorcheln. Es gibt viele intakte Korallenblöcke und eine ordentliche Vielfalt und Menge an Fischen (die üblichen Verdächtigen des indischen Ozeans, auch Blaupunktstechrochen, Rotfeuerfische, Fledermausfische, Muränen, Trompetenfische, Kugelfische, Kofferfische, Süßlippen, etc.).
Wenn man tauchen möchte, muss man ca. 40min Fahrt zum Gapang Beach auf sich nehmen. Dort gibt es mehrere Tauchbasen und einige recht gute Tauchplätze, die in ca. 15min mit dem Boot erreichbar sind.

Es gibt nur einen Stuhl und wenn man mittags den vorhandenen Schatten ausnutzen will, sitzt man unter der tropfenden Klimaanlage des Nachbarzimmers. Denn die Terrasse teilt man sich mit zwei anderen Zimmern. 
Das Restaurant ist nicht als Aufenthaltsbereich für die Hotelgäste geeignet. Es ist ein Restaurant, das viel von einheimischen Tagesausflügler besucht wird.
Strandbereich des Hotels und die Schnorchelausrüstung wirkt alles etwas schmuddelig.

Das Bett ist gut und die Klimaanlage auch. Es gibt viel Ablageplatz und die Dusche ist angenehm.
Die Pizza schmeckt hervorragend. 
Wir hatten zwar eine Schnorcheltour gebucht, die fiel aber wegen schlechtem Wetter aus. Das Schnorcheln am Samur Tiga Strand war aber ein toller Ersatz. Es ist einfach raus und wieder rein zu schwimmen. Am besten bei Ebbe, dann ist man nah an den Korallen - auch wenn sie nicht so toll sind. Es gibt viele Fische

In der Natur muss man immer mit kleineren Bewohnern rechnen. Das gesamte Personal war sehr hilfreich und sowas von freundlich. Auf dem Zimmer gibt es einen kostenlosen Wasserspender. Ein kleiner Privatstrand macht es auch möglich, sich mal im Bikini zu sonnen. Ausserhalb sollte man sich respektvoll kleiden. Wir haben eine Boots-schnorcheltour gebucht über die Unterkunft. comments.reviewPositives: Casa Nemo is echt een heel leuk beach resort met super gedreven en vriendelijk personeel. Heel persoonlijk ook wat het aangenaam maakt. De zee is rustig dus goed te snorkelen ook voor de minder goeie zwemmers ;) ik heb een heerlijke javaanse massage gehad bij de spa. Dit was werkelijk waar fantastisch! Het restaurant heeft een ruime menu kaart met hele lekkere gerechten en lekkere drankjes erop staan. En het ontbijt is ook heel fijn. Lekker eten! Restaurant is mooi aangekleed gezellige ambiance.

We stayed at the hotel for a short trip of island vacay in acheh. but what we find was more than what money could offer. The hotel ambiance surrounding by trees and nature, will definitely make you forget the hustle bustle of the city. At  night, we could hear owl hooting. The food was delicious and very affordable. The pizza is a must try.
The only downside that access can be difficult. You need to inform hotel to arrange tuk2 for you. but it is  very near to Sabang city and jetty.  but in the island itself is like that, so not so much issue. 
you can also get your money worth if you book the snorkel trip with the hotel. just contact the hotel, and let them know. They will arrange it for you. The hotel staff and Manager was very friendly and helpful. will definitely come again.^^

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Love how Balqis and her husband have transformed this location into a visually appealing and eco-friendly resort. Lovely gardens and walkways, handmade organic soap in the rooms, delicious and nutritious menu, very friendly staff, nice room overlooking the sea. I slept with the double doors open and the fan on to listen to the waves. Only drawback was that it was hot season and most of us guests commented on being pretty hot at night- most the rooms do not have AC and even with the one fan going, it takes quite a while to cool down after hiking the 105 steps up to the room from the beach. You have to be in good shape, too! As far as value for money: for a simple room with only a fan, although it did have a fridge, water dispenser, hot water shower (which I never needed) and lovely terrace- if I compare it to the price of the Airbnb I stayed in in uptown Kuala Lumpur 2 wks ago- that was a Much better bargain. I hope they find ways to keep the rooms cooler- more fans?

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
We hadden erg veel last van muggen en zijn werkelijk lek geprikt. We waren blijkbaar smakelijke slachtoffers voor ze.
Wat dat betreft is het beter om een kamer met airco te boeken bij Casa Nemo. Vakantiegangers die zo’n kamer hadden, hadden geen last van de muggen vertelden ze ons.
comments.reviewPositives: Het personeel is zeer vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Ze regelden ook het ticket voor de terugreis met de Fast Ferry. We hadden een superior bungalow. Prima bed, lekker warme douche, balkonnetje met uitzicht op zee, ventilator (helaas geen airco) en de mogelijkheid om koffie te zetten. Het ontbijt was uitstekend. Het restaurant is mooi en het eten is er prima. We waren half september hier en het weer was wisselvallig. Twee keer een scooter gehuurd en daardoor ontdekt dat we goed gekozen hadden voor Casa Nemo, ook omdat Freddies er naast  ligt waardoor het levendig was. Andere delen van Pulau Weh maakten een desolate indruk en waren veelal slechter onderhouden accomodaties die nu buiten het seizoen een treurige, verlaten indruk maakten. Op andere plekken was wel meer te doen op het gebied van Scuba duiken.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: We loved our time here, the owners were lovely, Mex the bar manager was so friendly, staff quick to serve and keep the place looking great.  And all the pizzas and pastas were delicious.  And the fresh baked bread, cinnamon buns, pancakes, fruits and coffees at breakfast were first rate.  But let's face it, as stylish and hip as it was we were there for the snorkelling out front and it was exceptional.  Turtles, sting rays, beautiful schools of surgeon fish, schools of Trigger and Parrot Fish.  Asian hot lips, colourful and huge pipe Fish, tiny through huge puffer fish and so much more.  We will return!  Our only recommendation is to bring mosquito coils so you can enjoy the beautiful views from the large comfy decks, we loved it but lots of mosquitos in that lush garden.
comments.reviewTitle: Exceptional experience Turtles directly in front!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I stayed 3 nights over a weekend.  They have done a lot to make this a pleasant garden experience in the side of a steep hill to the Sumurtiga (1km long) Beach.  Nice beach and good for snorkling...good fish variety.  The coral is plentiful but mostly uniform brown color.  Beautiful clear sea.  Food is a set Asian/Western menu and seafood pizza is their goto meal. Sat and Sun can be loud in the evening with locals visiting the Terrace Cafe on the beach. Most a very nice (fan only) bunglows all with a great sunrise view!  Stone stairs are  issue for people with feet, ankle or knee problems. My hilltop bungalow was 100 steps down (about 100ft) to the beach! Good exercise.  Best season they say is Jun-Aug.  Sabang can by truly severe weather conditions in Nov-Jan!!

comments.reviewComments:
On February 2018, we were so busy with the wedding preparation, documents, events and family (oh yes stress, like most other brides). we had very less time to enjoy out quality time together. Then we decided to have a break to sabang.

Casanemo is a perfect escape for us. It has friendly staff who tried to facilitate our requests, and foods are delicious. indeed not many choices for the breakfast, thus we ordered from the restaurant, and it tastes fantastic. 

We got a room with balcony views of clean white sand and turquoise ocean. With no disturbing neighbors. We will definitely be back!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Минусы конечно тоже были, но они настолько не значительные по сравнению со всей красотой, но все-таки расскажу! Мы жили в двухэтажной вилле, она находится прямо у дороги, соответственно очень слышно проезжающий транспорт, но к этому можно привыкнуть, а вот орущие среди ночи петухи немного напрягали))) 1 человек жил в бунгало #4 с потрясающим видом на море, у него дорогу и петухов было не слышно! На нашей вилле второй этаж был полностью деревянный, и на первом этаже очень было слышно когда кто-то ходил на втором! Но так как мы все ложились и просыпались в одно время, нас это тоже не особо напрягло! Ну и на кухне темновато!
comments.reviewPositives: Наверное, это самый красивый отель на острове и вообще в моей жизни!!! Ощущение, будто живешь в райском саду, где очень много цветов, поют экзотические птицы, трещат цикады и летают бабочки нереальной красоты! Слышен шум прибоя, а море красивого бирюзового цвета, с множеством мелких рыбок и кораллов! И все это хочется бесконечно фотографировать!!! И во всем этом раю кроме нас и персонала практически никого не было))) персонал очень приветливый и дружелюбный, мгновенно реагируют на каждую просьбу! Также у нас были включены достаточно обильные завтраки в очень красивом ресторане отеля! На завтраки были яйца (на выбор омлет, глазунья, вареные), панкейки с бананом и без, чай, кофе, соки, фрукты, булочки с корицей, йогурт, молоко, хлопья и обязательно какие-то местные блюда! По субботам в баре на пляже проходит концерт и каково было наше удивление, когда там пел наш дайвгид, с которым мы отлично отныряли 2 дня!!!))) кровати очень удобные, очень красиво смотрелись балдахины, уборку и смену белья делали по запросу! Много всяких шкафов, есть куда положить вещи, кулеры с водой на обоих этажах! В ванной тоже достаточно полочек! В 1 минуте ходьбы от  отеля есть прачечная, утром отдаете вещи, в 17 часов все чистое и аккуратно сложено в пакет! Просьба ко всем, кто будет жить на этой вилле, пожалуйста, кормите кошек, их там 4 и все такие худые((( Хочу выразить благодарность  всему персоналу за наш отличный отдых!!!❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Občasne smeti na plaži, ki so jih obiskovalci očitno pustili prejšnji dan, kar je nedopustno od obiskovalcev plaže. Morda bi bilo potrebno ob vstopu na plažo postaviti opozorilni napis, naj obiskovalci odnesejo s seboj svoje odpadke.
V primerjavi z drugimi plažami je na tej odpadkov zelo zelo malo, le tu in tam.
Plaža je drugače dolga, deloma peščena, deloma s kamenčki in čudovita.
comments.reviewPositives:
Izjemno prijazno, feksibilno in komunikativno osebje, vsi so bili vedno pripravljeni ustreči in pomagati z nasveti in predlogi; zelo dobra lokacija, možnost najema motorja, odlična hrana z možnostjo izbire med lokalnimi jedmi in internacionalnimi jedmi s poudarkom na italijanski kuhinji), zelo dobri, bogati in raznoliki zajtrki za vse okuse, najlepša plaža na otoku s koralnim grebenom, ležalniki in barom; možnost najema opreme za snorklanje, nepozaben pogled iz bungalova na morje; bungalovi so udobni s hladilnikom in gratis pitno vodo; na balkonu je gugalna mreža, klubska mizica in dva udobna stola; balkoni imajo vedno senco in se nahajajo v prečudovitem in zelo lepo urejenem vrtu s tropskimi drevesi in cvetličnimi grmi in z urejenimi tlakovanimi potkami. Celoten resort je izredno estetsko urejen, s spoštovanjem in z upoštevanjem lokalne in tradicionalne kulture. Resort je zelo ekološko naravnan, tudi v bungalovih se ločuje odpadke. Na plaži so ženske lahko v bikiniju.
Na splošno nama je bilo zelo všeč in se bova še vrnila. Toplo priporočava.
Posebej bi se zahvalila Jun, Putry (Teput) in Kis (lastnici in vodji resorta), ki so s svojo prijaznostjo pripomogle, da bodo naše počitnice nepozabne.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I travelled alone to Sabang and decided to stay with Casa Nemo. When I checked-in, it was at night time. But the next morning I woke up and see the view from my verandah. I was stunned. It was beautiful. The nature, the ambience, the people - everything is perfect. I was supposed to check-out and check-in to another resort nearby. But I've changed my mind and would like to stay for another one night. Luckily, their backpacker room was available. Ah tell you my friend, this ain't your normal backpacker room. It was still big with a queen size bed and sea view, only that you don't have your own verandah and hammock. But still, it was enough. The staff were all very helpful and friendly. I love it here. I love it so much and I would like to come back, for my honeymoon if I got married. <3

comments.reviewPositives:
I’ve stayed at Casanemo a few times, and it’s always a place I return to for the atmosphere and wonderful sense of hospitality. Each visit has been enjoyable, but this most recent stay turned out to be especially memorable for an unexpected reason.

Unfortunately, my daughter experienced food poisoning after having the mac and cheese. It felt like sheer bad luck, as we’ve dined there many times before without any issues. What truly stood out, however, was how Junie and the team responded. They were incredibly attentive and caring—preparing a special bowl of bubur for her and consistently checking in to make sure we were okay.

She was unwell for just one night, and after a quick visit to the hospital, she recovered well. Throughout it all, the team’s genuine concern left a lasting impression on us.

Casanemo continues to be a place that offers everything you need to truly unwind—delicious food, a relaxing spa, beautiful natural surroundings, and a stunning beach. It’s the kind of place where you can slow down and reconnect, and despite this hiccup, we would gladly return again.
comments.reviewTitle: It’s the kind of place to slow down and reconnect, and despite this hiccup, we would come back

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
Exceptional stay ,true service excellence at Casa Nemo

Casa Nemo is one of those rare places where everything simply feels right from the very first moment.
The house itself is beautiful, calm, and thoughtfully designed, but what truly elevates the experience is the outstanding staff and service.

Every member of the team is warm, attentive, and genuinely caring. Nothing feels forced or “hotel-like” — the hospitality is natural, human, and deeply professional. Requests are handled instantly, always with a smile, and often before you even realize you need something.

The atmosphere is peaceful and welcoming, making you feel more like a guest in a loved home than a client in accommodation. Cleanliness is impeccable, comfort is top-level, and every small detail shows pride and passion in what they do.

Casa Nemo sets a very high standard for hospitality.
It’s not just a place to stay it’s a place you remember and want to return to.

Highly recommended to anyone who values quality, kindness, and true service excellence.
Everyone was awesome, Juni 🥰 Mifta 🥰 each and every person just wow!!! We love it every moment , thank you thank you, thank you 🙏🏻

They put coffee and sugar in plastic boxes: box with sugar full of ants. 

Breakfast very basic and they should cover food from ants and flys. 

When I spoke with other guests they said they rooms was very clean so prob I was very unlucky but this shouldn't happen. All rooms should have same standards. 

Location was great,  just on the beach and great snorkelling spots. 
In general resort looks great but missed potential. 

If u looking for a good restaurant I recommend  Fredees restaurants just 10 min beach walk :)

Casanemo is beautifully presented and well kept. The staff are friendly & laid back (& no-one bothers you or tries to sell you anything). We stayed in the bungalow which has great views of the ocean & gardens. (The payoff though is the climb upstairs to the top.) The restaurant serves the best quality food in the area, and surprisingly great pizzas.
We visited freddy’s next door, which is much more cramped so we were delighted we had chosen Casa nemo instead. A snorkelling trip was a highlight especially spotting dolphins.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Overall things were great but we had a couple of things to share. We stayed with three kids 11, 9 and 5 in the Big Dewa room. The mosquito net was great over the main bed but the ones over the kids beds didn't wrap the whole way around, leaving them exposed during the night. The room has a few gaps under doors/ between boards etc so we did find some mosquitos got in and we had to sleep with repellent on. The beach was great at a fuller tide but it has a bit of a drop off and dumpy when the tide was lower.
comments.reviewPositives:
Casa Nemo is a glorious resort, visually stunning, great location, nice beach, the spa is amazing and the food is next level incredible! 
The staff were welcoming and kind. Super helpful in organising transport, snorkelling gear and extras. The aircon in the room is great and you have your own water filter which is super helpful. The balcony is also a great spot to hang and take in the stunning surrounds.

The food is all amazing and it's great having the full restaurant and the more simple, casual bar menu next to the beach as options on site. We ate at one other restaurant on the island, at Gapang beach and it was a bit disappointing- you will not be disappointed at Casa Nemo's two restaurants!

The other thing to know is to book your spa time in early. We left it until the day before on a weekend and it was booked out. The massages are amazing so book in early.

The island is incredible and there is lots to see and do. The staff are super helpful with organising trips or you can grab a scooter there and explore yourself!

Our family felt very comfortable and had a great stay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives:
I had a truly wonderful stay at Casa Nemo Resort! The entire hotel grounds are beautifully maintained, full of lush greenery and tropical plants, creating a peaceful, paradise-like atmosphere. The view of the ocean from the resort is simply stunning — especially from my bungalow, which had a direct sea view and was the perfect place to relax and unwind.

The bungalows themselves are very comfortable and offer a great sense of privacy. You really feel at home the moment you step inside.

The location is ideal — just a few minutes from Kota Sabang, so it’s easy to explore the town while still enjoying a tranquil setting away from the crowds.

The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout my stay. One highlight was how they assisted me in organizing a snorkeling trip with a local fisherman — a unique and unforgettable experience!

The on-site restaurant is also excellent, with a relaxed atmosphere and a wide selection of tasty dishes and drinks. Whether you’re having breakfast or dinner, the setting is lovely.

One of the best parts: direct access to the sea, where you can go snorkeling right from the resort! It’s such a special perk to have it right at your doorstep.

Lastly, the transfer to the harbor was organized smoothly and on time, which made my departure stress-free.

I would absolutely stay here again and recommend Casa Nemo to anyone looking for a relaxing, beautiful getaway on Pulau Weh!
comments.reviewTitle: Beautiful and Well-Managed Resort in an Excellent Location

1. Room was quiete old, need some refurbishment on the entrance door and roof ceiling.
2. It was raining at that night.The light on the entrance door was not functioned, it was very dangerous at night during the rainy season since there is no enough lighting. Have informed the staff on duty, but can not fixed due the technician is available.
3. The roof ceiling in side the room was leaked as a result the mattres and the room floor was very wet.
4. The restaurant staff was not very friendly. No greetings, the staff was busy chatting in side the kicthen area. We have been waiting for almost 15 minutes, no response and the table has not been cleared up from the last guest. The staff was only appeared once to serve the Gust (FOREIGN GUESTS !!!) and go back to the kitchen area and not even looking at us. We finally came to the kitchen area asking fro the servie and the staff provide us with the menu through the kitchen counter, not even facing us. Finally, we decide to cancell our diners.
All the above issues have been communicated to the staff and we managed to talk with the owners and the responses as follows :
1. So far there are no complaints from the guests for the restaurant staff, they are very helpful and fiendly.
2. We as the guests have to understand that the staff mainly for the restaurant staff are from the local residents and they do not have any backgrounds in the hospitality industry. The hotel was running not 100% for business but for charity in helping the local people. Therefore, We as the guest could not expect the good service compare from the other hotel. 
3. Our booking from Agoda was actually the last booking that they can accept since they have to pay quite sum of fee to Agoda.
Finally, the owner offered us a complimentary room or a room refund. But, we have decided to decline the offer since our main purpose to visit the Sabang island is for holiday not for making money. Iw was really UNPLEASANT STAY !!!

comments.reviewNegatives:
Overall we had a great stay, so the negatives are pretty minor:

- Limited drink options available, mainly coffee and fruit juice, which is fine if that's what you like. Beer is not on the menu but is available on request.

- The furniture on the balcony of our deluxe room was old and tired compared to the nicer furniture on the balconies of the bungalows, so wasn't the nicest place to sit.

- The curtains aren't wide enough to fit the windows in the bedroom, so there was always a fairly big gap, especially around the main doors, which people walking past to their rooms could easily see through. 

- As with all the hotels we stayed at in Sumatra, the bathroom towels are terrible. No hand towels, just bath towels that are very thin and don't get you dry (they somehow just move the water around). 

- Some of the food items on the menu aren't clear about what they contain. I ordered something that didn't mention meat or seafood but when it came it contained both. Most of the other items on the menu were quite descriptive and mentioned the key ingredients but a couple clearly dont. The staff were apologetic and brought me something else, so not a problem, but something to be aware of.
comments.reviewPositives:
Hotel is is a lovely position on the hill overlooking a beautiful stretch of beach with a great reef for snorkeling. Beach kept very clean with sun loungers and clean bathroom facilities. 

The quality of the food in the restaurant is good, including the buffet breakfast, and the rooms are spacious, clean and comfortable. We opted for a deluxe room as we wanted air conditioning, and there was a fridge in the room as well. Also great to have a water dispenser in the room so we could just top up our bottle whenever we needed. 

Great spa, which is also very reasonably priced. 

Staff are very friendly and helpful.

We booked a sea-view bungalow - it's wasn't really sea-view at all because huge trees obliterate any view of the ocean below. I'm not suggesting they cut the trees, at all, but "Sea View" probably hasn't been accurate for about ten years. The trees were nice, in that they provided some shade.

Bungalow is extremely hot without AC - we were given another fan which helped a lot but if you feel the heat book an AC room or you'll suffer

The beach has trash on it every day - I'd pick it up and put it in the plastic bag hanging from a tree but every morning there was more - not Casa Nemo's fault of course, the plastic situation, but it would be nice to see that staff care enough about the environment to pick it up so it's not just laying there or washed back out to sea.
Sabang is littered in trash and it's incredibly depressing to see the disregard locals have for the natural environment, which drives tourism.
Everyday I felt despair at the plastic problem and unfortunately I wouldn't recommend Sabang as a destination.

comments.reviewComments:
We stayed at Casa Nemo at the end of October this year. It's truly a beautiful place, and you can tell that a lot of care and attention goes into the upkeep of the resort. The beach is beautiful and really nice and quiet - one morning we seemed to be the only ones on the beach! Amazing!

Having never snorkeled before, the waters on this part of the island were awesome, and we also took a boat to the 'Japanese Garden', which I'd highly recommend. Although the coral is bleached and isn't the colourful scenes you might hope for, the variety of fish makes up for it! We didn't see a turtle but did see a sea snake and lots of other cool fish!

The restaurant is quite nice, although language is sometimes a bit of a barrier when ordering. The grilled fish is delicious! The owners are very friendly and laid back - though could be too laid back perhaps... We had booked a taxi to pick us up from the ferry upon arrival, but the manager seemed to have forgotten about it. No big deal though, as there was a taxi available at the port. The rooms aren't cleaned while you're there, but it was spotless on arrival and the rooms are very well kept.

All in all I'd completely recommend for anyone to stay at Casa Nemo. I'm sure that it's by far the best place to stay on Pulau Weh, and the closest thing to paradise! If you visit North Sumatra, be sure to spend a good few days here!!!!
comments.reviewPositives: The tranquility, the snorkeling, the views!

The food was tasteless- everything we tried except for the soto ayam, had no salt, or other seasonings. The kitchen didn't even have any lemon available to add flavour to the tasteless food.

comments.reviewComments:
Casa Nemo really exceeded my expectations...I made reservation for three nights…stayed seven...
1. Quite sand beach only in 50-100 downstairs steps, depends in which bungalow you are staying
2. Coral reefs directly from the beach. Good snorkelling, not the best but so accessible…you can snorkel as much as you want…fantastic.
3.You can make a snorkel tour with a fisherman. Me and a two other guest did that and thanks to the fisherman we saw probably 50-100 dolphins swimming jumping around us for more then half an hour…what an experience…we were so happy…
4.Basic but good and big bungalows with comfortable bed, relaxing terrace and hot shower.
5. The owner Belquis and all the staff are very nice and positive and within minutes you feel as a good friend.
6. Bar with good music aalmost on the beach. Good cocktails and party every Saturday…
7. It is so easy to make friends here. From day one you have new friends. For me as a single traveller this is an extra plus, but I actually  highly recommend Casa Nemo to all kind of guests. 
THANK YOU CASA NEMO FOR A WONDERFUL WEEK....SEE YOU SOON!!!
comments.reviewPositives: Quite sand beach. Coral reefs directly from the beach. Big bungalows with hot shower. GREAT athmosphere

Location makes it hard to go out and find anything better so you are stuck eating what they have. Room was great however, especially for a single traveler. Other great thing was that they arranged diving with a local shop and everything was smooth, from pick-up to drop-off. I am not a big dog-person, but their dogs are great; very well-behaved and likeable. Overall, a decent place to stay if you are on Sabang. comments.reviewComments: Casa Nemo is in a beautiful location. However, from the moment we arrived, we felt uncomfortable, as the staff there did not seem to know what they were doing and seemed to be put out by any kind of request. The food was disgusting and left me very sick for a week. In my opinion, it was not fresh. All the staff, continually smoked and the whole place was completely littered with cigarette butts. They even smoked in the kitchen! They could not control their dogs either, and allowed them to howl all night- disturbing our sleep. This was all minor compared to our last evening, when 30 or so angry men came to the resort and decided to wreck the place because Casa Nemo refused to give them money. My husband and I were very concerned for our safety and once again got the feeling that the staff did not know what they were doing. They even told us that the men had threatened to burn down all the huts.Needless to say , we spent all night worrying. Not a relaxing break at all!

comments.reviewComments:
The resort features ethnic-style buildings, with rooms consisting of wooden stilt houses facing the open sea. 

Very beautiful and romantic, perfect for honeymoon couples. Not suitable for families with infants and small children or the elderly, as the path to the rooms involves quite a number of stairs. It's indeed beautiful, but if you forget something in the vehicle, it takes quite a bit of energy to go up and down those stairs 😂

By the way, the breakfast is a buffet and delicious, especially the watermelon juice and pancakes 🤤 But the variety is lacking for a hotel with a rating equivalent to 4 stars in a big city. Perhaps because it’s on an island and there aren’t many rooms. That's all, hope this helps.
comments.reviewTitle: Suitable for young couples who love sports

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
We booked this resort after reading a number of reviews, and not only it did not disappoint but it also exceeded our expectations!
From the friendliness of the entire team to the impeccable service given in the reception kitchen and restaurant, this resort is the place to book while you are in Pulau Weh.
The resort has its own access to the beach where it is possible to do some really good snorkeling. 
We travelled as a couple and our room had a a really nice view onto their garden and the sea. The bed was comfortable and had a mosquito net. The shower was good.
There was also a fan in the room which we used a lot during our stay since the nights were very hot in July. 

The restaurant is also incredible! There is a good selection of dishes, very vegetarian friendly, and the breakfast, which was included in the price, was the best we had in our trip to Indonesia. Nice breakfast every morning, with different hot meals, fruits, some pastries, Asian or Western breakfast, we were spoilt with choice!

There is no proper WiFi signal but you can easily get it at the restaurant where the signal is strong. I used to stop there in the afternoon, have some coffee and get some work done on my laptop with no problems.

Also, Casa Nemo is located on the side of the island that is less touristic, near the main town Sabang. We went to the main town on a couple of occasions at night just to feel the local vibe. During the day, we used to go to other parts of the island with our scooter, which we hired at Casa Nemo. The normal price to rent the scooter is 100.000 RP per day.

All in all, this place is amazing and we would not hesitate to book this again in the future if we go back to Pulau Weh. 
We would like to thank the amazing Rio at the reception (thank you so much for all your help, all the information given, and for helping us with our heavy bags when we arrived), you are a star! ;) Of course a big thank you to all the other members of the big Nemo family (they are too many to name here) and to the lovely and amazing owner of the place.
We wish you all a very successful life and hope to see you again in the future!

Marta and Bruno

Sehr schöne Unterkunft mit eigenem, sauberen Strandabschnitt und kleiner Beach-Bar (um dorthin zu gelangen, müssen ziemlich viele Stufen hinunter gegangen werden).  Die im angegliederten Spa angebotenen Massagen sind toll. Im Hotelrestaurant kann man gut zu Abend essen und hat einen schönen Blick. Das inkludierte Frühstück war sehr gut, mit Obst, Gebäck, Kaffee, frisch gepresstem Saft und auf Wunsch frisch zubereitetem Omelette oder Pancake. 
Verglichen mit vielen anderen Unterkünften auf Pulau Weh die wir gesehen haben (wir haben zuvor bei Iboih gewohnt) bietet das Casanemo Resort einen schönen Komfort, eine gepflegte Anlage und saubere Zimmer, teilweise sogar mit Klimaanlage (Gold wert bei den Temperaturen!).  Für ein paar Tage Strand- oder Spa Urlaub sehr empfehlenswert, zum Tauchen oder Schnorcheln sollte man sich in Richtung Iboih orientieren, hier ist die Infrastruktur besser und das Meer ruhiger und klarer.
comments.reviewTitle: Schöne Unterkunft mit eigenem Strand und Spa

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Uns hat sehr gut gefallen. Angefangen bei der Lage des Hotels mit an den Hang gebauten gemütlichen Bungalows mit Meerblick und Hängematte auf dem Balkon. Die Anreise vom Hafen mit dem TukTuk war problemlos und hat ca. 20 Minuten gedauert. Im Hotel kann man sich dann für 100.000 IDR pro Tag einen Roller mieten. Der Preis entspricht dem, was auch am Hafen angeboten wird.

Das hoteleigene Restaurant hat eine gute Auswahl an Gerichten. Auch auf vegane Ernährung wird hier auf Nachfrage gut eingegangen. Zudem kann man sich an der gemütlichen Beachbar leckere Drinks mit Meerblick genehmigen. Das Personal ist super freundlich, herzlich und zuvorkommend und macht den Aufenthalt noch einmal besonderer. Ein großes Lob!

Zudem können wir auch die Massage im hoteleigenen Spa wärmstens weiterempfehlen.

Einchecken im Resort war sehr langwierig, Personal an der Rezeption war sehr unstrukturiert und unfreundlich. Wir hatten ein Zimmer mit aircondition, welches gut ausgestattet war. Großer Wasserkanister im Zimmer mit dem man auch heißes Wasser zur Verfügung hatte. Zimmer wird nur auf Verlangen gereinigt, was aber nicht mitgeteilt wurde. Frühstück war sehr basic. Personal am Strand war sehr freundlich und bemüht.
Massagen waren auch hervorragend.
Essen am Strand mit schönem Ausblick. Der Garten der Anlage ist ebenfalls wunderschön angelegt, aber für gehbehinderte nicht geeignet. Um vom Strand in die Zimmer oder zu Rezeption zu gelangen, musste man einige steile Treppen überwinden.

Es ist wohl das einzige Hotel auf Pulau Weh, welches Alkohol ausschenkt, das führt allerdings nicht zu vielen Partys, sondern einfach dazu, dass man sich Abends mal mit einem Bier an den Strand setzen kann. 
Das Hotel bietet auch die Vermittlung von Rollern, Ausflügen und Tauchgängen/kursen an. Gerade das Tauchen kann ich auf Pulau Weh nur empfehlen.
Problematisch ist manchmal, dass das Personal größtenteils nur sehr schlechtes Englisch spricht, was bei der Bestellung von Mahlzeiten öfters mal zu Problemen führt.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Nostra terza vacanza al Casanemo, che ho trovato migliorato e ancora più piacevole: ampio bungalow con splendida vista sul mare, acqua calda e giusta pressione nella doccia, lussureggiante giardino molto curato, staff amichevole e attento, pulizia e attrezzature per la spiaggia, spa e massaggi da provare. E anche compagnia di simpatici gattini. Casanemo si affaccia su una spiaggia magnifica: acqua celeste, pesci colorati, palme e sabbia bianca.
comments.reviewTitle: Ottimo resort in una spiaggia magnifica

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: La struttura non è come sembra essere nel sito internet. Le stanze con aria condizionata si trovano fuori dal vero e proprio resort, a livello della strada (con i rumori della strada conseguenti) vicino alla reception, devi fare una montagna di scale per scendere e salire dalla spiaggia. La stanza deluxe che ci hanno assegnato non aveva neanche un tavolino, nulla dove appoggiare o appendere qualunque cosa. Abbiamo dovuto mettere tutto per terra. Le stanze senza aria condizionata sono nella parte "vera" della struttura, nel verde e con vista mare, ma sono trascurate e si muore di caldo perché i ventilatori sono insufficienti. Pulizia zero: in 7 gg mai pulita la stanza. Solo 1 asciugamano a persona per tutto! Ristorante pessimo e sporco. Cani e gatti che vanno ovunque e rubano nei piatti, mosche e formiche aggrediscono la colazione. Spiaggia bella ma sporca. Un vero peccato. Personale gentile e presente, fa quello che può. La SPA è piccolina ma deliziosa, ottimi massaggi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Dopo la piacevolissima esperienza di agosto 2014, quest'estate siamo tornati al Casa Nemo e si è confermato eccezionale. Abbiamo richiesto la stessa camera dello scorso anno,family bongalow: ampio, confortevole, bagno in pietra, con acqua potabile calda e fredda, balcone spazioso con amaca da dove si ha una vista fantastica del mare. La struttura è costituita da una decina di casette in legno, una zona reception e ristorante, una terrazza lounge bar che si affaccia sulla spiaggia. Inoltre è stata aggiunta anche la spa: relax e coccole da provare. Lo staff è sempre sorridente e gentilissimo, di grande aiuto nell'organizzazione di escursioni, affitto di motorini e trasferimento al porto dei traghetti. La spiaggia è un gioiello: sabbia bianca, con vegetazione lussureggiante, mare cristallino azzurro e verde, con moltissimi pesci colorati. Vorremmo tornarci anche per le prossime vacanze!
comments.reviewPositives: mare fantastico, staff cordiale e atmosfera

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Abbiamo prenotato per 5 notti un family bongalow: ampio, confortevole, bagno in pietra, con acqua potabile calda e fredda, balcone spazioso con amaca da dove si ha una vista fantastica del mare. La struttura è costituita da una decina di casette in legno, una zona reception e ristorante, una terrazza lounge bar che si affaccia sulla spiaggia. Lo staff è sempre sorridente ed estremamente disponibile, di grande aiuto nell'organizzazione di escursioni, affitto di motorini e trasferimento al porto dei traghetti. La spiaggia è un gioiello: sabbia bianca, con vegetazione lussureggiante, mare cristallino azzurro e verde, con moltissimi pesci colorati. Siamo stati benissimo al Casa Nemo e avremmo voluto prolungare il nostro ssoggiorno.

Het resort is heerlijk, perfecte ligging. En het eten is erg goed. Jammer dat het personeel in het restaurant erg slecht Engels praten. Er komen erg veel locals die het erg bijzonder vinden om een Europeaan te zien. Ze willen met je op de foto en staren enorm.. moet je tegen kunnen. 

Grote domper was aan het einde. We hadden snorkels gehuurd. Hier zat een oude bij die kapot ging in het water. En daarvoor moesten we een rekening betalen. We kregen (door het slechte Engels) niet duidelijk dat we dit niet klantvriendelijk vinden. Het ging tenslotte per ongeluk. We kwamen niet eerder weg zonder te betalen voor de kapotte snorkel. Erg jammer..

Positief punt is mr Deny, hij kan je in zijn TukTuk overal naartoe brengen. Wat een lieve man!! Vraag bij de receptie naar Mr Deny, hij is de vaste chauffeur.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Quem diria que em Pulau Weh encontraria alguém a falar português? Encontrámos aqui na Casanemo. A dona do estabelecimento fala português e é uma anfitriã de excelência que faz tudo para que a sua estadia seja impecável e inesquecível. Os bungalows são lindos com vista para o mar. A praia é linda e é possível fazer snorkeling apesar de haver outros sítios melhores na ilha…No entanto já dá para observar inúmeros peixes entre mergulhos. Nesta praia é possível tomar banho de bikini ao contrário de certas zonas de Pulau Weh. O restaurante é muito bom e com preços muito acessíveis. O staff é muito simpático e nota-se que há um esforço da dona para dar a formação adequada e as condições de trabalho dignas a todos. Também são muito prestáveis via whatsapp para prestar qualquer informação antes da chegada à ilha (transporte, horários de ferry, etc). 
Altamente recomendável.

Sebuah resort yang menarik..90% diperbuat daripada kayu..

Biliknya tiada aircond (standard bungalow)..malam dingin jadi tiada masalah panas sewaktu tidur..

Masalahnya setiap chalet terletak di lereng2 bukit..jadi kena mendaki.. (tidak sesuai untuk warga emas) mak saya sakit lutut lepas duduk di sini..huhuhu

Pantainya betul betul di hadapan resort..tapi anda terpaksa turun bukit dan terus ke pantainya yang airnya biru dan hijau..sangat jernih .. yang azab, nak balik ke bilik terpaksa pula mendaki tangga..fuhh lelah dibuatnya...

Jangan bawa beg yang berat2.. sewaktu saya check in tiada bantuan dari staff untuk angkatkan barang anda...mereka tunjukkan jalan di hadapan dan saya ikut dari belakang dengan mengangkat beg yang berat ( stay untuk 2 malam,pakaian untuk 2 orang)...

ada seorang staff perempuan yang uruskan check in yang kurang mesra..ermm tak senyum langsung...dah la penat angkat beg..huhu..saya tak kisah bayar tips untuk staff tolong angkatkan beg tapi tiada bantuan dihulurkan..

Walaubagaimanapun, saya enjoy selama 2 hari saya di Sabang, Pulau Weh...

조용한 섬과 리조트를 원해 Pulauweh Casanemo에 오게되었습니다. 고작 3일밤 이었지만 직원들과 많이 친해졌고 그래서 아주 편안한 기분으로 지냈습니다. 
Casanemo는 제가 꿈꾸던 바다를 가졌습니다.
Casanemo의 식당도 매우 만족스러웠습니다.
음식이 맛있고 직원들도 매우 친절합니다.
제가 머무르는 동안 파티가 열려서 정말 즐거웠습니다.  
작은 섬이지만 마트까지 거리가 좀 있어 이동수단이 필요합니다. 리셉션에서 스쿠터를 빌릴수있습니다. 가격은 하루 100만 루피아 정도.
벌레가 싫으시면 방갈로가 아닌 아파트먼트 형식으로 지어진 디럭스 룸을 예약하시면 됩니다. 
킹사이즈 침대에 모기장이있어 편안한 밤을 보냈고 에어컨이 있어서 시원했습니다. 
사랑해요 Casanemo 💜

Lokasi bungalow yang cukup unik, dibangun di bibir Tebing, bungalow berbahan papan dengan atap daun rumbia menjadi ciri unik Casanemo Bungalow, terlebih dengan kelambu dan tanpa fasilitas TV tetapi dengan cerdas memberikan fasilitas wifi memberikan kesan klo kita benar benar terlepas dari rutinitas seharian.

Pemandangan ke laut yang sangat indah, pantai yang landai, pantai yang indah, pPelayanan dengan senyuman dan makanan yang sesuai dengan selera membuat kita betah dan ingin kembali kesana. 

Terima kasih Casanemo Bungalow Sabang

comments.reviewComments: Мы пробыли здесь 10 ночей. Здесь очень уединённо, красиво и комфортно. Очень вежливый и весёлый персонал. Здесь отдыхает в основном молодые пары. Очень хорошая скорость интернета. Большое разнообразие подводного мира, хоть и мёртвые кораллы из-за цунами. Это лучший отель на острове.  Сюда не добрались русские туристы ;-) P.S. если бронировать через агоду то цена на 10$ в сутки дороже от действительности. Лучше через сайт самого отеля.

comments.reviewComments:
We loved our hut overlooking the beach - the view was amazing, the bed comfortable and everything was spotless and clean.
The bathroom is not the newest one, but everything was clean and working, so it's not a problem at all.
There is a water dispenser in the room, which os great.
The hotel staff was amazing and very helpful, top service:)
Breakfast was served in the restaurant and we loved it - a few asian choices, as well as fruit, cakes and eggs made to order.
One small thing - the shampoo provided by the hotel was really bad, so better use your own - I had to wash my hair once again just after using it.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Przepiękne położenie na skarpie w otoczeniu bujnej roślinności (trochę schodów do pokonania). Przemiła obsługa. Jest bar przy plaży i restauracja na górze, która ma bardzo fajny wystrój. Możliwość wypożyczenia skutera i zrobienia prania. Plaża z bialym piaskiem i mnóstwem rybek, widzieliśmy też żółwia. Moim zdaniem najlepsze miejsce na nocleg na wyspie - zdecydowanie bardziej nam odpowiadało od Iboih. Cisza i spokój. Wyspa jest na tyle mała, że wszędzie można dotrzeć szybko skuterem a widoki po drodze są niezapomniane.

Left Casa Nemo today and already miss the place. Stayed in two beach front bungalows. Be aware that there is no AC but a fan in the room which is perfectly fine once you get used to the heat. Wonderful outdoor bathroom and the premises are so beautifully kept. But the best of all is the wonderful caring staff! They do all they can to make you feel extremely welcome and they succeed 100% We’ll be back! Thank you Junie and the rest of the staff🙏🏻
All the best,
Annette & family

comments.reviewComments:
Casa Nemos ejer, er noget af det mest behagelige og betænksomme menne
ske vi længe har mødt. Hun har haft stedet i ti år, det skal lige siges at hun kun er ca 30 år.  Hun har taget et kæmpe samfundsmæssiget ansvar, da det meste af hendes personale ingen uddannelse har, og derfor, hvis det ikke var for hende, ville have haft det svært på arbejdsmarkedet. Hun er en kvinde der står ved sine værdier og ikke vil ligge under for at kvinder i Aceh ikke bør drive forretning som hun gør. Det giver hende dagligt problemer med alt fra dårlig omtale til at købe vare til resortet.... men hun fortsætter!! 
Stedet er skønt, fantastisk beliggenhed, personalet er søde og hjælpsomme. Det er et sted der skal opleves. Miljøet bliver der også tænkt på, hvilket rigtig mange i Indonesien kunne lære noget af!!!  Her får man ikke sugerør i sine drikkevarer... det er bare en lille ting, men tænk hvis alle fulgte hendes fodspor....

comments.reviewComments:
I had reservations about writing this review because I’m scared people would start flocking to the resort, but they deserve it. The rooms are built cleverly by the cliff, so each room has a perfect sea view and is surrounded by greenery.
The food served at the beautiful restaurant exceeded our expectations – the pizza has the proper crust, and all the other dishes are flavorful. The fries from the restaurant by the beach are the best! We had them every time we were done snorkelling at the beautiful house reef. We spotted juvenile moray eels, lionfish, boxfish, trumpetfish, octopus, sweetlips, slugs, butterflyfish and many other coral reef fishes.
Our stay at the resort was seriously worthwhile for the price we paid. The staff was very accommodating; they arranged the dolphin and snorkelling trips, which we had the best time ever. The only thing they need to focus on is the cleanliness of the toilets; the walls need a bit more scrubbing 😊
